// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.consumer.x;

// Sibling class with its OWN same-name method: the bare call resolves via
// implicit this to this class's own declaration, not the declared reporter in
// a different class in the same package - the catch swallows.
class SiblingReporter {
    void logInternal(Throwable cause) {}

    void ownMethodShadowsDeclared() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            logInternal(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
